name: Capital Genesis Ranker
tagline: 7-dimension revenue scoring engine — 5,987 methods ranked daily with phase-aware weight shifting and resource-awareness boost
content_angles: 5,277 revenue methods scored on 7 dimensions daily
Phase-aware weight shifting: priorities change as revenue grows
P0/P1/P2/P3/KILL tier system for execution priority
description: Scores every revenue method on 7 weighted dimensions: revenue potential (0.25), speed to revenue (0.20), downside risk (0.15), automation potential (0.15), synergy score (0.10), upfront cost (0.10), liability risk (0.05). Weights auto-shift based on revenue phase ($0 sprint vs $5K+ protect mode). Resource-awareness boost checks disk for existing playbooks (+1.0 speed), scripts (+0.8 auto), products (+0.5 speed). Outputs P0/P1/P2/P3/KILL priority stack consumed by CEO Agent daily at 5:30 AM.
